messages.content: What is the age of the statue of liberty?
The Statue of Liberty is over 134 years old, having been completed in October 1886.

The Statue of Liberty was a gift from the people of France, designed by French sculptor Fredric Auguste Bartholdi, and dedicated on October 28, 1886. It was paid for by donations from individuals, corporations and organizations, as well as the sale of tickets to the observation tower. The money was also used to build the pedestal on which the statue stands.
